_comment: Template for pipeline/inbox/inbox-ledger.local.json (gitignored). The drop-folder ledger: one entry per file seen in the Drive hub Inbox/, keyed by content sha256 so re-scans are idempotent. All fields null/empty here; the real ledger holds no file CONTENT, only classification and routing state. Written only by the inbox-routing flow after human approval; proposals never touch it.
